text: マイショップで商品検索を実行

アークス・ロビーにあるビジフォンから
「マイショップ」→「商品検索」を試そう！

※検索設定は任意。武器なら「カテゴリーの設定」に
　「新世武器」、「レアリティの設定」に「10」な
Look Up Goods in a Personal Shop

From the Visiphone in the ARKS Lobby, select "Personal Shop"
and then "Goods Search"!

Note: Any search parameters are allowed. For example,
if you would like to search for a weapon, from within "Category,"
you can select such options as "weapons," "rarity 10," and so forth.
